generated_oml:
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure, specifically exemplified by a Living Lab case study, with unified virtual representations of physical assets for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle optimization."
    base:contains BCSOperationalSensors, HVACActuator, LightingActuator, BIMModel, ModularServiceArchitecture
]

instance BCSOperationalSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors within Building Control Systems (BCS) that collect real-time operational data from physical assets and transmit it to the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData BCSOperationalDataTransmitted
]

instance BCSOperationalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSOperationalSensors
]

instance BCSOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data from Building Control Systems sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BCSOperationalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for IoT device management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for modeling and metadata enrichment"
    DTDFVocab:enables BuildingPerformanceSimulationService, Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering for automated transformation of BIM models into runtime artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables BuildingPerformanceSimulationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight, HVACControlAction, LightingControlAction
]

instance BuildingPerformanceSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building performance for optimizing operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingPerformanceSimulationInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5 for building model"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data for monitoring building operations"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for visual comfort"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for non-visual health effects"
]

instance BuildingPerformanceSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for building performance optimization"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building model"
]

instance HVACControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust HVAC settings based on predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust lighting levels based on visual comfort insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system actuators receiving control signals from Digital Twin to adjust temperature and airflow"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system actuators receiving control signals from Digital Twin to adjust illumination levels"
]

instance ModularServiceArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modular service-oriented architecture with standardized extension points for scalable integration"
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with device metadata (sensors, actuators, controllers) and middleware configurations for Eclipse Hono and Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering, BIMTools
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the Digital Twin are transmitted to physical actuators through Eclipse Hono and Ditto, enabling bidirectional communication for real-time adjustments to building operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical assets and digital twins, with data exchange and processing occurring continuously to support live operational decisions."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated framework integrating BIM as semantic backbone, Eclipse Hono/Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, with roles for Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers to manage deployment, monitoring, and service extension."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all building life cycle stages from initial design through construction, operation, refurbishment, and adaptation, as supported by Building Information Modeling (BIM) throughout the asset's lifecycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure interoperability and architectural soundness; addresses semantic drift through synchronization techniques to maintain alignment between digital models and physical counterparts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols for bidirectional real-time data exchange between physical assets and digital twins, supporting standardized IoT communication and device management."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards and standardized integration frameworks to ensure interoperability across heterogeneous systems and workflows in the AECO domain."
]
